title: Provision of shops, etc. by employers for sale of commodities to
content:
employees
An employer may establish shops, stores or places for the sale of 
commodities to his employees, but no employer shall bind any 
employee by contract, agreement or other obligation, written or 
oral, express or implied, to make use of any such shop, store or 
place for the purchase of commodities.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
